title: astragalus calvaryformis
intro: Astragalus calvaryformis, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus calvaryformis are numerous, including reducing stress and fatigue, boosting the immune system, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
